title_en: Bill 32 passes restricting union fundraising, organizing, and political spending
title_fr: Le projet de loi 32 est adopté, limitant le financement syndical, l'organisation et les dépenses politiques
description_en: The Restoring Balance in Alberta's Workplaces Act (Bill 32) passes, restricting union activities including political donations without explicit member consent, limiting picketing, and increasing employer access to union financial records. The Alberta Federation of Labour calls it the most anti-union legislation in decades.

update_log.note: Added R-088 (CBC Edmonton Bill 32 introduction). Removed single-source flag.
Added R-100 (bill text Tier 1), R-101 (Athabasca analysis). Removed single-source flag.
